issue_title: Step outcome logger: per ogni step, registra sezioni presenti + outcome

manual_reviewer_judgment.notes: Evidenza multi-step presente ma non ancora sufficiente per completed reale.

recommended_follow_up: Add multi-step depth threshold before completed.
runtime_overhead_note: No deep loop integration; Mission Brain wrapper only.
